name: velatis-charts-workspace
description: Open, stateless astrology charting with shareable URLs.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @velatis/charts-contracts build && pnpm --filter @velatis/charts-client build && pnpm --filter @velatis/charts-web build && pnpm --filter @velatis/charts-server build
scripts.check: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm compliance
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @velatis/charts-contracts build && pnpm --filter @velatis/charts-client build && pnpm -r typecheck
